title: Implement Comprehensive Simulation Validation Tests
description: Implement Comprehensive Simulation Validation Tests - Create and implement complete simulation validation test suite covering core simulation components, cross-platform capability, metrics export, and distributed testing scenarios. Ensure all key simulation functionalities are validated before hardware testing. This work supports the broader Epic: Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic.
close_reason: Implemented complete simulation validation test suite covering core simulation components, cross-platform capability, metrics export, and distributed testing scenarios. All key simulation functionalities are now validated before hardware testing.
